domain: Hawaiian hula halau (formal school): kumu (master teacher) maintains style integrity through lineage; alaka'i (student leader) models style execution for others; students dance in synchronized row formation; 4 basic steps (kaholo, lele, hela, uwehe) with shoulders-steady knees-bent invariants; training imprints procedural memory in sinews; lineage continuity passed kumu-to-kumu
specific_mechanism: HULA-HALAU-KUMU-ALAKAI-FORMATION-PHASE-LOCK: 3-tier kumu-alaka'i-student phase-locked formation with kumu-style invariant + lineage-refresh + sinew-imprint memory. (1) Kumu LLM K (high-capacity teacher): emits style-anchor embedding e_kumu defining current generation's style invariant. (2) Alaka'i LLM A (mid-tier student-leader): conditioned on e_kumu, emits formation-leader step a_t (front-row exemplar). (3) Student LLMs {S_1, ..., S_R} (R-row formation): each S_i emits step s_t^i = phase-lag-locked(a_t, lag=i*delta) — exact phase-lag lockstep. (4) Kumu-style invariant loss: L_kumu = sum_i ||s_t^i - kumu_proj(s_t^i)||^2 + ||4-basic-step constraint|| + ||shoulder-knee invariant|| projecting all rows into kumu's style manifold. (5) Sinew-imprint slow-LR procedural memory: per-student weight update w_si^new = w_si - lr_inv * grad_inv - lr_new * grad_new where lr_inv << lr_new (slow change for invariants, fast for new moves). (6) Lineage style refresh: at every M-step interval, kumu K periodically refreshes from previous-generation-kumu archive K_prev (style integrity transmission across kumu generations). (7) Differs from R094 PHYLLOTAXIS (golden-angle distribution, no 3-tier) and R426 HAKA (synchronized stamp, no lineage) and R477 LAUNEDDAS-TRIPLE-LOCK (1+2 triplet drone, no lineage) and R502 CASTELL-PINYA-TRONC-PHASE-RISE (2-phase build, no kumu-style invariant + no sinew-imprint) by 3-tier kumu-alaka'i-student + phase-lag-locked row + kumu-style-invariant 4-step loss + sinew-imprint slow-LR + lineage style refresh.
llm_application: HULA-HALAU-KUMU-ALAKAI-FORMATION-PHASE-LOCK 3-tier kumu-alaka'i-student lineage + style-anchor embedding e_kumu + alaka'i front-row exemplar + R-row phase-lag-locked formation (lag=i*delta) + kumu-style-invariant 4-basic-step loss + shoulder-knee projection constraint + sinew-imprint slow-LR procedural-memory + lineage style-archive periodic refresh. Differs from R094 PHYLLOTAXIS. R426 HAKA. R472 BAYANIHAN. R477 LAUNEDDAS-TRIPLE-LOCK (closest — 1+2 drone+melody triplet, no kumu-lineage + no sinew-imprint). R490 BOUZOUKI-TETRACHORD-COUPLE. R502 CASTELL-PINYA-TRONC-PHASE-RISE (closest — 2-phase hierarchical, no lineage + no style-anchor + no sinew-imprint). Differs from GQA Grouped Query Attention + MLA Multi-Head Latent + Hierarchical Attention Graph RSC 2026 + State of LLMs Raschka 2025 by 3-tier kumu-alaka'i-student lineage + phase-lag-locked row formation + kumu-style-invariant + sinew-imprint slow-LR + lineage refresh. Differs by 3-TIER KUMU-LINEAGE + PHASE-LAG-LOCK + STYLE-INVARIANT + SINEW-IMPRINT + LINEAGE-REFRESH.
novelty_claim: GQA + MLA + Hierarchical Attention Graph + State of LLMs cover grouped + hierarchical attention space. HULA-HALAU-KUMU-ALAKAI-FORMATION-PHASE-LOCK adds (a) 3-tier kumu-alaka'i-student LLM lineage + (b) phase-lag-locked R-row formation + (c) kumu-style-invariant 4-basic-step projection loss + (d) sinew-imprint slow-LR procedural memory + (e) lineage style-archive periodic refresh. Recombination — borderline lookup.
